paragraphs.scope: These Terms and Conditions govern the use of mobee.am website (hereinafter referred to as the "Website").
paragraphs.acceptance: By accessing or using the Website, you agree to these Terms.
paragraphs.disagreement: If you do not agree to any part of these Terms, please do not use the Website.
paragraphs.changes: The Website reserves the right to modify these Terms without prior notice. Changes become effective upon their publication on the Website.
paragraphs.continuedUse: Continued use of the Website implies acceptance of the updated Terms.

definitions.title: Key Definitions
definitions.intro: The following definitions apply in these Terms:

website.label: Website
website.description: The online platform mobee.am offering services, content, and various functionalities.

user.label: User
user.description: Any individual or legal entity accessing or using the Website.

services.label: Services
services.description: All products, services, content, and tools available via the Website.

content.label: Content
content.description: Any text, images, videos, audio, or other materials available on the Website.

intellectualProperty.label: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.description: Website name, logo, texts, software, and other elements protected by copyright or trademark law.

transaction.label: Transaction
transaction.description: Any purchase, service registration, or other contractual agreement on the Website.

lawful.label: Use the Website only for lawful purposes.

technical.label: Not interfere with the Website’s technical operation.

malware.label: Not distribute viruses, malware, or any harmful code.

access.label: Not attempt to illegally access Website servers or data.

content.label: Not publish or distribute illegal, offensive, defamatory, or hate-inducing content.

paragraphs.blocking: The Website reserves the right to block any User who violates these Terms.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.intro: The Website is not responsible for:

paragraphs.asIs: The Website is provided "as is" without any warranties.
paragraphs.indirectDamages: The Website is not liable for indirect damages, including lost revenue or data loss.

userInfo.label: Incorrect or false information entered by Users.

thirdParty.label: Damages resulting from third-party interactions with the Website.

content.label: The accuracy, reliability, or timeliness of the content provided.

paragraphs.ownership: All materials on the Website, including texts, images, logos, and software, belong to the Website or its rightful owners.
paragraphs.prohibitedCopying: Copying, distributing, selling, or using any content without prior written permission is strictly prohibited.
paragraphs.trademarkUse: The User has no right to use the Website’s trademark or domain name without written permission.

paragraphs.paidServices: If the Website offers paid services, payments must be made under the specified conditions.
paragraphs.priceChanges: The Website may change prices or payment terms without prior notice.
paragraphs.refunds: If applicable, refund policies will be outlined separately on the Website.

paragraphs.law: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Armenia.
paragraphs.negotiations: All disputes should first be resolved through negotiations.
paragraphs.courts: If negotiations fail, disputes will be handled in the competent courts of Armenia.

forceMajeure.title: Force Majeure
forceMajeure.intro: The Website is not responsible for failure or delay in fulfilling obligations due to force majeure circumstances, including:

conflicts.label: Military conflicts, terrorism, or civil unrest.

technicalFailures.label: Technical failures beyond the Website’s control.

paragraphs.policy: The Website commits to protecting user data in accordance with the Privacy Policy.
paragraphs.processing: The Website may collect and process user data for legal purposes.
paragraphs.authorities: The Website reserves the right to disclose user data to authorities as required by law.
